summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Yates Mar de Cortés yacht rental landing page. All required features tested and working correctly including hero carousel, navigation, fleet display, experiences, reservation process, FAQ accordion, contact form, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with background image carousel (8 images from external source)
Navigation works - all 6 links scroll to correct sections
Fleet section displays 4 yacht cards with correct yacht information
Experience section shows 4 experience types with proper details
Process section displays 5 reservation steps correctly
FAQ accordion opens and closes correctly - tested functionality
Contact form validation works for invalid email input
Contact form submission works - displays success message
Mobile menu toggle functionality works in mobile view
All 16 external images load correctly from 4sdu63dub3c3u.ok.kimi.link
Footer displays correctly with social media links
Complete navigation flow works across all sections
Reserve buttons are clickable in yacht and experience cards
success_percentage: Frontend: 100% - All tested features working correctly
